args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: TypeScript class with type interfaces, handler combinations up to x10
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating Hono apps with configurable initApp and default options

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Utility functions for Context, using RouterRoute and URL patterns
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request, src/utils/url
- Safe summary: Route inspection helper for getting matched routes and path information in handlers

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
- Reads as: WebSocket upgrade interface with event listeners and WSContext class
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for upgrading HTTP connections to WebSocket with event callbacks

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, generateCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Cookie management functions using parse/serialize utilities
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie helper for getting, setting, and managing cookies with signed options

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Testing client generator using hc from client module
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context, src/hono
- Safe summary: Testing helper that creates a client for testing Hono apps

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
- Reads as: Runtime detection helper for identifying execution environments
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Adapter helper for accessing environment variables based on runtime detection

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS template functions with experimental features
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/dom/css, src/helper/css/common
- Safe summary: CSS helper for building styles with template literals on server and client

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, minify
- Reads as: Common CSS utility functions with minification and hash generation
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index
- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities providing class name generation and style string building

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: Fetch API wrapper for proxy requests with header filtering
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests with configurable header handling

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Route inspection and debugging utilities
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Development helper for displaying registered routes with optional colorization

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: HTML template rendering with escaping and callbacks
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: HTML helper for rendering templates with automatic escaping and callback support

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile
- Reads as: SSG (Static Site Generation) generator with plugin support
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: SSG helper for generating static pages from Hono routes

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions
- Reads as: Main SSG implementation with concurrent route fetching and file saving
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: Core SSG logic handling concurrent page generation with hooks and plugins

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Path manipulation utilities for file system operations
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg
- Safe summary: Utility functions for path manipulation and route filtering for SSG

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT
- Reads as: SSG middleware for controlling static site generation per route
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: Middleware for marking routes as SSG-only or disabling SSG for dynamic routes

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
- Reads as: Streaming helper exports for different stream types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
- Safe summary: Streaming helper providing SSE and text streaming capabilities

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
- Reads as: Generic streaming implementation with TransformStream and context stashing
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: Base streaming helper for real-time data delivery with error handling

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming with event format handling
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/html, src/helper/streaming/stream
- Safe summary: SSE streaming helper for server-push messaging with proper format

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Text streaming with plain content type and chunked encoding
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/helper/streaming/stream
- Safe summary: Text stream helper for streaming plain text responses

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Accept header parsing and matching utility
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts
- Safe summary: Accepts helper for parsing and matching Accept headers

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions
- Reads as: Accept header matching with quality value sorting and fallback
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accept header helper for content negotiation with language and type support

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo
- Reads as: Connection information type exports
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types
- Safe summary: ConnInfo helper for accessing HTTP connection details

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Type definitions for connection information
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index
- Safe summary: Type definitions for connection information including remote address and port
